info.title: Altoviz API
info.description: Free RESTful APIs for invoicing and accounting. Manage quotes, invoices, contacts, customers, products, suppliers, receipts, and purchase invoices.

get.description: Returns all settings including timezone, logo, VAT number, VAT mode, and more.
Returns information about the authenticated user.
Returns a list of customers with optional filtering.

parameters.name: internalId
parameters.description: Filter by internal ID from your app

get.description: Returns a specific customer by ID.
Retrieves a customer using your own app's internal ID.
Returns sale invoices with optional filtering by dates, customer, or status.

post.description: Finalizes a draft invoice, making it official.
Marks a finalized invoice as paid with date and payment method. Supports metadata.
Creates a purchase invoice by uploading a PDF file.

get.description: Downloads a purchase invoice as a file.

apiKeyHeader.name: x-api-key
apiKeyHeader.description: API key obtained from Altoviz Settings > API access
